goal: Idea B (supply analysis): extend the source reserve to account for LATENT reachable enemy garrisons (strongest single enemy that could launch and reach an owned planet within the horizon), combined with the in-flight term via MAX, to stop source-stripping deaths.
change: _threat_reserve_source_budget now also computes a latent reachable-enemy threat from cross_dist + enemy fleet speed, and reserves against max(in-flight, latent).
Combat-aware (strongest single enemy, not sum) to avoid over-reserve; savable-gated; 4P only; 2P untouched.
trace_note: seed 1399615834 (symmetric 4-way brawl): held ships at t36 but still lost all planets by t44; single-seed inconclusive, judged on aggregate.
